name: Ole Mule Axes N Fun LLC
about: Ole Mule Axes n' Fun LLC is a family entertainment center located in Rolla, Missouri, on Route 66. The venue offers a diverse range of activities, including axe throwing, a full-sized NASCAR simulator, an indoor golf simulator, and various arcade-style games. It provides an environment for families, friends, and groups to enjoy interactive entertainment and dining, with a focus on bringing fun through a mix of modern technology and nostalgic charm. The golf simulator allows for year-round play with realistic course simulations, and the facility is positioned as a destination for both casual fun and special events like birthdays and parties.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor play regardless of weather
Realistic course simulations with instant swing feedback
Ability to practice and improve various shots including drive, pitch, and putting
Offers other sports simulations like baseball and soccer for variety

food_and_drink.notes: Farm-fresh smash burgers made with beef from Hancock Caldwell Farms
Drink menu available; BYOB not explicitly mentioned but full bar implied

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs to work on your swing, club angle, drive, pitch, and putting in the golf simulator room.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers an amazing smash burger and drink menu, but outside food and drink policies are not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, but it does mention that the simulator offers realistic courses and year-round play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Ole Mule Axes n' Fun is described as a premier family entertainment center with activities for all ages, making it kid-friendly.
